intel.title: Intel Desk / Urgent Dispatch
intel.message:
Subject E remains within German territory.
Expected departure window has closed.
Unknown party may have intervened.
intel.system_note:
In the baseline history, Albert Einstein did not return to Germany after Hitler's rise in 1933.
Current timeline indicators suggest he remains near Berlin / Caputh.

Please determine whether this is source error, archive inconsistency, deliberate misinformation, or timeline divergence.
intel.suggestion: Before taking direct action, verify both source credibility and baseline records.

timeline: 1933-03-XX  Einstein expected not to return to Germany
1933-03-27  [ANOMALY] Subject E still traced near Berlin
1933-04-07  Law for the Restoration of the Professional Civil Service
historical_notice:
Historical sensitivity notice:
This case involves antisemitic persecution, state violence, exile, and academic purges. Treat all interventions as high-risk.

feedback.timeline: Timeline focus: March-April 1933 divergence window highlighted.

feedback.archives: Archives query: baseline records and missing border evidence queued.
feedback.source: Source B-17 verification: reliability medium, propaganda risk high.
